title.en: Ye Tian was quickly attracted by this terrifyin...

content.en:
I saw that this invincible existence of the sixth realm slashed away with a sword in his hand, and the terrifying power seemed to have destroyed the infinite territory and cut through countless dimensions.

However.

Ye Tian was quickly attracted by this terrifying sword.

"It's not a supreme mastery, it seems to be even more terrifying than the supreme mastery!!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He thought that the supreme mastery was the most powerful move, but after seeing this move, he knew that he was wrong.

Immediately after, a legacy flooded into his mind.

Immediately, the stele became unpretentious, and no longer had any mystery to be seen.

He knew that he could only get this inheritance, and the other benefits were not to be considered.

【Five Realms Supreme Learning】

This is the inheritance that Ye Tian obtained, but this Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sect cannot be cultivated, because it was not created by him, and it can only be used as a reference.

But after learning about the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, he only knew that above the Supreme Absolute Learning, there was also the Supreme Absolute Learning.

If the Fifth Realm realizes the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, he can leapfrog and kill the existence of the Sixth Realm, and it is very easy.

The cultivation requirements of the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sect are the Eleventh Dimension and the Seven Dimensional Dimension rules, plus the seven innate multi-dimensional Dao Bodies26, which need to be fused with these three powers to turn into the Supreme Absolute Realm.

The difficulty of creating the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect is more than ten times more difficult than the Creation of the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect.

Fortunately, he obtained this Sixth Realm Invincible Powerhouse's Five Realm Supreme Peerless Learning, and the difficulty was suddenly reduced tenfold.

But even so, it was very difficult for him to create the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect.

And he still doesn't meet the requirements of the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, so he hasn't comprehended the sevenfold dimensional rules yet, and if he can't comprehend the sevenfold dimensional rules, he can't perform the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, so he can't start researching.

"I have to find a way to quickly comprehend the rules of the Seven Dimensions!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he already has the Dimensional Rule Treasure, and comprehending the Dimensional Rule is already very fast, far surpassing the other Fifth Realms, if he wants to continue to accelerate, it will be too difficult!

"No, I can speed up my comprehension again, I am now using the multi-dimensional wisdom light and the multi-dimensional treasure realm to comprehend the dimensional rule treasure, and the multi-dimensional wisdom light is the innate multi-dimensional secret technique of the Ka Ye wisdom body, but the Ka Ye wisdom body only has three layers of realm, I can completely create the fourth layer! The multi-dimensional Yan Treasure Mirror is a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure, if he finds such a treasure at the level of the innate multi-dimensional treasure, the effect will be even better. "

Ye Tian thought so.

Before, he didn't expect this to be in a hurry, but now he was in a hurry, wanting to comprehend the rules of the sevenfold dimension faster.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian tried his best to create the fourth layer of the content of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, although it was a bit difficult for him, it was not too difficult, and it was much easier than creating his own multi-dimensional killing body.

In addition, he is also collecting treasures that are similar to the effect of the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Mirror, but the grade has reached the level of the Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure.

There are a lot of innate multi-dimensional treasures in the 4000 Territory, and he doesn't believe that there are no such treasures.

He also knows some of the Fifth Realm, although the relationship is not very good, but now that he is facing the Death Multidimensional Tribulation Period, many Fifth Realms will fall at any time, if they trade with them, take out the treasures that will improve their strength, they should still be willing.

Ye Tian communicated with some Fifth Realms, and also made simple transactions, took out some resources that could save his life, and exchanged for a lot of useful information, and finally knew which Fifth Realm had an innate multi-dimensional treasure that could be deduced and analyzed.

"Luo Qing Realm Lord, I didn't expect him to have this kind of treasure, it's really fate!"

His Firmament Wood Blade came from the Luo Qing Realm Lord, and now it seems that he has to talk to the Luo Qing Realm Lord again.

......

Supreme Green Sect.

this day.

Ye Tian came here to visit the Luo Qing Realm Lord.

At this time, the entire Supreme Green Sect was shrouded in countless formations, and these formations were used to resist the death calamity, otherwise the death calamity rushed into the Supreme Qing Sect, and countless disciples would fall and die.

Ye Tian's arrival caused the faces of several Fifth Realms of the Supreme Green Sect to change drastically.

If Ye Tian took the opportunity to attack the Supreme Green Sect and destroy the formation of the Supreme Green Sect, then the Supreme Green Sect would suffer heavy losses!

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, what are you going to do?"

Luo Qing Realm Lord's voice came.

"Lord Luo Qing, I want to trade with you an innate multi-dimensional treasure - the Ten Pivot Gold Plate!" Ye Tian said his purpose.

Ten Pivotal Gold Plates?

Luo Qing Realm Lord really didn't care much about this innate multi-dimensional treasure, it was just an ordinary innate multi-dimensional treasure, and he hadn't even reached it, but why did he want to trade with Ye Tian?

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, the Ten Pivot Gold Plate is of great use to me, I won't trade, you can go!"

Ye Tian knew that the Luo Qing Realm Lord would not agree easily, so he put forward his own request: "I can use the Firmament Wooden Blade to trade, the Firmament Wooden Blade is the Three Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure, and the Ten Pivots Gold Plate is just an ordinary Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure, and it has huge side effects, so it is useless to you." If you wish, you can trade now. "

As soon as he mentioned the Firmament Wooden Blade, the Luo Qing Realm Lord was very annoyed, it was originally his innate multi-dimensional supreme weapon, but it was snatched away by Ye Tian, and now it was used to trade with him, this is disgusting to him!

However, he did need the Firmament Blade to boost his strength by 707 liters.

Without the Firmament Wooden Blade, his strength was reduced by at least one or even two percent, and the Ten Pivot Gold Plate was indeed of little use to him, and the truly rational act was trading.

But he couldn't just trade like that.

"It's not enough, the Firmament Wooden Blade is my treasure, and if you trade it with me, I still lose. You need to trade other treasures with me, or you'd better go!"

The Lord of Luo Qing Realm guessed that Ye Tian urgently needed the Ten Pivot Gold Plate, so he dared to sit on the ground and raise the price, he didn't believe that Ye Tian would give up like this.

Ye Tian was silent for a long time before he spoke: "Yes, I will exchange another innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure level defensive weapon for your ten-pivot gold plate, if you don't want to, then I'll leave immediately." "

"Defensive Tribulation Innate Multi-dimensional Treasure !!!"

The Lord of Luo Qing Realm was immediately moved, and immediately responded: "Okay, I promise!"

He was afraid that Ye Tian would regret it!

Swish!

The Lord of the Luo Qing Realm came out of the Supreme Qing Sect and held the Ten Pivot Gold Plate.

And Ye Tian also took out the Firmament Wooden Blade and another defensive innate multi-dimensional treasure and traded with the Luo Qing Realm Lord.

On the surface, Luo Qing Realm Lord made a lot of money, and Ye Tian lost a lot.

But for Ye Tian, he is the real big profit! .
